penalties.description: Cannot determine task completion or timing from educational presentation frames.

reasoning: Claude identified this as an educational presentation about FLS programs rather than an actual task performance, while GPT-4o attempted to score what it perceived as a task execution. Given the fundamental disagreement about video content, Claude's assessment that no actual Peg Transfer task is visible takes precedence as it explains why no coherent task phases or reliable timing could be established.
